messages.unsigned:
Thank you for your contribution! 🎉

Before we can merge your pull request, you need to sign our Contributor License Agreement (CLA). This is a one-time process that protects both you and the project.

**For individual contributors:** Please visit the link below to sign the CLA electronically.

**For corporate contributors:** Your organization needs to sign our Corporate CLA. Please have your authorized representative email the signed agreement to legal@zopio.com.

[Sign the CLA]({{cla-url}})

Once you've signed, this PR will automatically update. Thank you for your understanding!
messages.signed: ✅ CLA signature verified. Thank you for contributing to Zopio!
messages.external: This pull request is from an external contributor and requires CLA verification.
